0.title: GitHub Radar — Discovery Pipeline (gharchive)
0.content:
# GitHub Radar — Discovery Pipeline

Monitors the gharchive event-stream discovery source introduced in ISI-950 (Path C). Live metric emission is wired in ISI-955 hooks (`internal/daemon/gharchive_discovery_hooks.go`).

**Current health gates** (from ISI-950 acceptance):

- Active repo count ≥ 5000 after 7-day soak
- Classifier queue depth bounded
- Live GitHub API rate-limit usage < 80%
- Dedup working (ratio > 0.9 steady state)

**Phase B telemetry coverage (this dashboard rev):**

| Tile | Series wired? | Gated on |
|------|---|---|
| Archive ingest lag | ✅ | merged + redeployed |
| Events processed | ⚠️ scalar `event_type=unknown` | ISI-961 (per-type hook signature) |
| Candidates per hour | ❌ | ISI-952 pipeline-hook follow-up |
| Dedup ratio | ❌ | ISI-952 pipeline-hook follow-up |
| Classifier queue depth | ❌ | ISI-954 backpressure-gate code |

Owner: Observability Agent · Story: ISI-955 · Soak: ISI-956

3.title: Pending tiles — wiring gaps
3.content:
### Tiles pending engineering merges

- **Candidates per hour** + **Dedup ratio** — wait on a Story-2 pipeline-hook surface (`gharchive_pipeline.go`). Track as follow-up; named series:
  - `github_radar.discovery.gharchive.candidates_total`
  - `github_radar.discovery.gharchive.dedup_ratio`
- **Classifier queue depth** — wait on ISI-954 (`gharchive_backpressure` branch not yet merged). Named series:
  - `github_radar.discovery.classifier.queue_depth`
- **Per-event-type breakdown** on the *Events processed* tile — wait on ISI-961 (keptPerType hook signature). Until merged the tile renders a single `event_type=unknown` row.

Instrument registry already lives in `internal/metrics/discovery_meters.go` — once each emission site lands, the dashboard tiles light up without a JSON change.
